Reverse-Optimization Engine

Goal-first search. Scans built-in parcels using the same Forward analysis engine, then ranks sites by fit.

Auto-applies persona-based caps (site size + effective GFA). Adjacency/frontage tags (if present) refine format & scale.
Residential reverse ranking uses the Forward feasibility + finance engine for consistency.
Underwriting Assumptions
Risk Level
Soft 25% · Premium 1.05 · Parking $20k surface / $40k structured

Step 2: Scenario

Select building type scenario (this controls which options appear next).

Program Comparison Signals

Screening-level guidance based on zoning envelope + simple assumptions (not a financial model).

Step 3: Program & Inputs

Select program (funding track) and enter key inputs for this scenario.

Use Type

Select a commercial use type. Presets auto-fill; adjust only 3 key inputs.

Retail
Preset parking ratio: 3.5 per 1,000 SF
Office
Preset parking ratio: 2.5 per 1,000 SF
Medical
Coming soon
Flex
Coming soon
These 3 inputs feed directly into Step 4 (parking + floorplate fit + service risk).

Use Composition

Define the share of floor area for each use. Total must equal 100%.

Total: 100%
Residential share
%
Used to allocate total buildable GFA into residential area for unit-capacity checks.
Commercial share
%
Used to allocate remaining GFA into commercial area for parking and stack implications.
